name: Acctivate Inventory Software API
what_it_does: Acctivate inventory management REST API for small distributors and manufacturers with FDA compliance, QuickBooks integration, and multichannel order management. Enables AI agents to manage inventory tracking and lot/serial control for regulated industry compliance, handle purchase order and vendor management for distribution procurement automation, access multichannel order management (EDI, Amazon, Shopify) for omnichannel fulfillment, retrieve FDA product traceability and lot recall management for food and medical device compliance, manage warehouse operations and bin-level inventory for distribution center automation, handle product data and pricing management for catalog operations, access customer and order history analytics for distribution business intelligence, retrieve freight management and shipping label integration for fulfillment automation, manage QuickBooks financial synchronization for SMB accounting integration, and integrate Acctivate with QuickBooks Online/Desktop, EDI providers, and e-commerce platforms.
use_cases: Managing FDA lot tracking from food safety agents
Processing multichannel orders from distribution agents
Syncing inventory from QuickBooks integration agents
Managing EDI from retail compliance agents
not_for: Large enterprise distribution requiring full ERP
best_when: An SMB food distributor, medical device company, or multichannel retailer using QuickBooks wanting AI agents to automate FDA-compliant lot tracking, multichannel order management, EDI processing, and inventory management.
avoid_when: FDA LOT TRACEABILITY ACCURACY: Automated Acctivate lot tracking for FDA-regulated food or medical device inventory must maintain complete lot-to-source traceability; automated lot assignment without purchase order and vendor lot linkage creates FSMA and FDA 21 CFR 820 recall traceability failure. FSMA PRODUCE SAFETY TRACEABILITY: Automated lot tracking for FSMA Food Traceability Rule-covered produce must maintain Key Data Elements (KDE) including traceability lot code, production date, and location; automated records missing KDE create FDA inspection failure. EDI retail compliance — automated EDI 856 ASN for retail customers must accurately reflect shipped contents before dispatch; automated ASN transmission with inaccurate data creates retail chargeback. QuickBooks sync dependency — automated Acctivate operations with broken QuickBooks sync create inventory-financial reconciliation failures; monitor sync health continuously.

auth.notes: Acctivate uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Fort Worth, Texas HQ. Founded 2001. Private. SMB distribution and manufacturing inventory. QuickBooks integration. FDA compliance for food and medical device. 1,000+ SMB distributor customers. Competes with Fishbowl, Cin7, and DEAR Inventory for QuickBooks inventory add-on.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user pricing with module add-ons
pricing.notes: Fort Worth TX. Founded 2001. Private. 1,000+ SMB distributors. QuickBooks integration. FDA compliance. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; on-premise performance varies by server configuration

known_agent_gotchas: FDA FSMA TRACEABILITY LOT CODE KDE COMPLETENESS: Automated lot tracking for FSMA Food Traceability Rule-covered produce and processed food must capture all Key Data Elements at each Critical Tracking Event; automated lot records missing KDE (traceability lot code, production date, ship-to location) create FDA inspection failure and potential product recall inefficiency

NO WEBHOOKS — INVENTORY AND ORDER EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Acctivate lacks webhook support; order receipt, inventory change, and lot allocation events require polling; implement scheduled polling at appropriate business cadence

QuickBooks sync health monitoring required — automated Acctivate operations with stale or broken QuickBooks sync create inventory-to-GL reconciliation breaks; implement QuickBooks connection health check before each automated session

On-premise network dependency — Acctivate on-premise installation requires LAN or VPN access to Acctivate server; cloud-hosted automation must use VPN or API gateway; plan network access before automated workflow deployment

Lot genealogy forward and backward traceability — automated lot tracking must support both backward traceability (finished good → component lots) and forward traceability (component lot → all finished goods); one-directional lot tracking creates incomplete recall response capability

EDI trading partner setup validation — automated EDI processing for retail customers requires validated trading partner configuration (ISA/GS identifiers, transaction set mapping); automated EDI without trading partner validation creates retail rejection and chargeback
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB inventory management. SOC2. API key. US. Inventory, lot, and FDA compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB distribution inventory. SOC2. API key. US. Inventory and FDA lot traceability data.
